name: VSGO VS-S02E APS-C Sensor Cleaning Kit
description: The VSGO APS-C Sensor Cleaning Swab Kit is the ideal kit for APS-C 16mm sensor cameras. Sensor cleaning swab with the free-alcohol cleaner can protect your optical coating.

features.Key Features :: Super Fine Microfibre Tip | Maintain Imaging Transparency | Perfectly Fitting the APS-C Sensor | Sensor Cleaning Swab Size: 16mm
